message: docs: add architecture SVG diagram to README

files.patch: @@ -21,12 +21,7 @@ npx wrangler dev ## Architecture -``` -Client ──WebSocket──▶ Worker ──▶ Durable Object (Workspace) - ├── SQLite (metadata, process table, cache) - ├── R2 (file content) - └── Container (npm, node, heavy commands) -``` + Commands are tiered: - **Built-in** (cat, ls, grep, echo, pwd, ...) — execute directly in DO, $0 cost, <1ms
